description: Economics and Business concept progression map — Knowledge and Understanding, Year 7 to 10. No ACARA sub-headings exist — strands are thematic groupings.
subject: Economics and Business

_notes.strand_groupings: ACARA Economics and Business K&U has no sub-headings. Strand groupings are thematic interpretations, not ACARA headings.

standards.title: Opportunity cost and scarcity
standards.description: why opportunity cost exists as decisions are made to allocate limited resources to meet unlimited needs and wants
standards.y_goal: Students explain why opportunity cost exists as decisions are made to allocate limited resources to meet unlimited needs and wants.

standards.title: Purpose of businesses
standards.description: the reasons businesses exist and how different types of businesses provide goods and services
standards.y_goal: Students explain the reasons businesses exist and how different types of businesses provide goods and services.

standards.title: Entrepreneur characteristics
standards.description: characteristics of entrepreneurs and how these influence the success of a business
standards.y_goal: Students explain characteristics of entrepreneurs and how these influence the success of a business.

standards.title: Work and income
standards.description: the reasons individuals work, the types of work they are involved in, and how they may derive an income
standards.y_goal: Students explain the reasons individuals work, types of work and how income is derived.

standards.title: Consumer rights and responsibilities
standards.description: the rights and responsibilities of individuals and businesses in relation to consumer and financial products and services
standards.y_goal: Students explain the rights and responsibilities of individuals and businesses in relation to consumer and financial products and services.

standards.title: Markets and price signals
standards.description: how markets influence decisions about the allocation of resources to the production of goods and services, and the effect of prices on these decisions
standards.y_goal: Students explain how markets influence resource allocation decisions and the effect of prices on these decisions.

standards.title: Business adaptation
standards.description: different ways that businesses adapt to opportunities in the market and respond to the changing nature of work
standards.y_goal: Students explain how businesses adapt to market opportunities and respond to the changing nature of work.

standards.title: First Nations enterprise
standards.description: how First Nations Australian businesses and entrepreneurs develop opportunities in the market
standards.y_goal: Students explain how First Nations Australian businesses and entrepreneurs develop market opportunities.

standards.title: Taxation and decision-making
standards.description: the importance of Australia's system of taxation and how this system affects decision-making by individuals and businesses
standards.y_goal: Students explain the importance of Australia's taxation system and how it affects decision-making by individuals and businesses.

standards.title: Planning and budgeting
standards.description: processes that individuals and/or businesses use to plan and budget to achieve short-term and long-term financial objectives
standards.y_goal: Students explain processes individuals and businesses use to plan and budget for short- and long-term financial objectives.

standards.title: Financial sector role
standards.description: the role of Australia's financial sector and its effect on economic decision-making by individuals, businesses and global markets
standards.y_goal: Students explain the role of Australia's financial sector and its effect on economic decision-making by individuals, businesses and global markets.

standards.title: Economic interdependence
standards.description: how economic decision-making involves the interdependence of consumers, businesses, the financial sector and government
standards.y_goal: Students explain how economic decision-making involves the interdependence of consumers, businesses, the financial sector and government.

standards.title: Trade and global markets
standards.description: the reasons Australia trades with other nations, and the patterns of trade between Australia and Asia
standards.y_goal: Students explain the reasons Australia trades with other nations and patterns of trade between Australia and Asia.

standards.title: Competitive advantage
standards.description: processes that businesses use to create and maintain competitive advantage, including the role of entrepreneurs
standards.y_goal: Students explain processes businesses use to create and maintain competitive advantage including the role of entrepreneurs.

standards.title: Risk and reward management
standards.description: how individuals and businesses manage consumer and financial risks and rewards
standards.y_goal: Students explain how individuals and businesses manage consumer and financial risks and rewards.

standards.title: Economic indicators
standards.description: how and why the economic indicators influence economic decision-making
standards.y_goal: Students explain how and why economic indicators influence economic decision-making.

standards.title: Government economic intervention
standards.description: the ways that government intervenes in the economy to improve economic performance and living standards within Australian society
standards.y_goal: Students explain how government intervenes in the economy to improve economic performance and living standards.

standards.title: Major financial decisions
standards.description: factors that influence major consumer and financial decisions, and the short- and long-term consequences of these decisions
standards.y_goal: Students explain factors that influence major consumer and financial decisions and their short- and long-term consequences.

standards.title: Superannuation system
standards.description: the importance of Australia's superannuation system and how this system affects consumer and financial decision-making
standards.y_goal: Students explain the importance of Australia's superannuation system and how it affects consumer and financial decision-making.

standards.title: Workforce productivity
standards.description: processes that businesses use to manage the workforce and improve productivity, including the role of entrepreneurs
standards.y_goal: Students explain processes businesses use to manage the workforce and improve productivity including the role of entrepreneurs.

progression_threads.description: Thematic strand groupings — ACARA has no sub-headings for Economics K&U.
